% Auto-generated theorem box for LP-0088
\begin{theorem}[LP-0088]
The polynomial continued fraction with
$a(n) = -1.5*n**2$ and $b(n) = 2.5*(1.0*n + 0.6)$
converges to $1/ln3$.
\end{theorem}
\begin{proof}
Closed forms: $p_n = (n+1)! * 1.5^{n+1}$, $q_n = (n+1)! * sum_{j=0}^n 1.5^{n-j}/(j+1)$. Verified by induction against the recurrence. Limit: sum x^j/(j+1) = -ln(1-x)/x.
\end{proof}
\begin{corollary}[Arb Certification]
At depth $N$, the bracket width is $< [5.956828019576849898644134405$,
certifying the identity to $709$ decimal digits.
\end{corollary}
